Cutting Corners -- Not the Quality

Professional gemstone cutter focused on color, yield, and stone potential for jewelry professionals nationwide.

Cutting for Seven

Philosophy

My Four C's

Color is the goal.

Conscious of the weight.

Careful with my approach.

Cutting is my craft.

Where It Happens

The Studio

Every stone passes through a focused, single-cutter environment — no outsourcing, no shortcuts. Just precise handwork from rough to finished gem.

What I Do

Services

Custom Cutting

Receive a tailored cutting experience designed to reveal a gemstone's highest potential.

Re-Polish & Re-Cut

Breathe new life into existing cut stones and restore their beauty without compromising weight.

Jeweler Services

Online service requests and work orders for industry professionals for quick turn arounds and shorter lead times.

Sell Gemstones

An online shop with custom and flexible purchasing features, including pay now, pay later, inquiries and negotiations directly through the site.

Buy Rough

Source quality rough gemstones for your cutting projects.

Buy Gems In Bulk

Wholesale purchasing from jewelers and dealers.

About

The Cutter

Michael Wall

Based in Tempe, Arizona, I've been part of the gemstone industry since 2013, transitioning from amateur enthusiast to professional cutter in 2021. My focus is on med-high weight retention cuts that maximize both value and beauty.

I work closely with jewelers across the industry, specializing in natural colored gemstones including sapphires, tourmalines, emeralds, tanzanites, and more. Whether you need a custom cut, re-polish, or expert consultation, I'm here to deliver results that exceed expectations.

View PortfolioCall 480-286-4595

Ready to Start?

Whether you have a rough stone waiting to be transformed or need expert advice on your next project, I'm here to help.
